description:
Implement `hx-message-bar` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. Full-width inline message for page-level or section-level notifications (distinct from hx-alert which is for component-level).

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-message-bar/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-message-bar.ts`, `hx-message-bar.styles.ts`, `hx-message-bar.stories.ts`, `hx-message-bar.test.ts`

**Props:** `variant` (`info`|`success`|`warning`|`error`), `closable` (boolean), `open` (boolean, default true), `sticky` (boolean — position: sticky at top)

**Slots:** `icon`, default (message content), `action` (CTA button/link)

**Events:** `hx-close`

**CSS Parts:** `base`, `icon`, `message`, `action`, `close-button`

**ARIA:** `role="status"` (info/success) or `role="alert"` (warning/error). When closable and dismissed, element is hidden (not removed from DOM — set `display: none` via `open` prop).

**Difference from hx-alert:** hx-message-bar is block-level, full-width, typically placed at the top of a page/section. hx-alert is inline, sized to content.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (variants, close, sticky), axe-core zero violations, Storybook all variants, bundle < 3KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-message-bar — T3 Inline Message/Banner
